intro: Experience the rolling terrain and shaded canopies of Lake McMurtry's finest trails. Test your endurance in one of Oklahoma's most scenic, highly-runnable trail races.

accordions.title: Course Map & Elevation
accordions.content:
The course features rolling single-track dirt trails. Total elevation gain is approximately 1,200 ft for the 25K.

[Interactive Map Placeholder]

accordions.title: Aid Stations & Cutoffs
accordions.content:
We are a cupless race. Please bring a reusable flask. Aid stations will be stocked with water, electrolytes, gels, and salty snacks.

  • Aid 1 (Mile 4.5): Water & Gels
  • Aid 2 (Mile 9.0): Full Aid (Cutoff: 10:30 AM)
  • Aid 3 (Mile 13.1): Water Only

accordions.title: Drop Bags & Crew
accordions.content: 50K runners may leave one drop bag at the Start/Finish line, which is accessible at the halfway point (Mile 15.5). Crews are only allowed at the Start/Finish area.

accordions.title: Awards & Swag
accordions.content: All finishers receive a custom wood medallion. Podium awards go to the top 3 Male/Female in both distances.
